errors.unknownError: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.ldapUnavailable: Authentication service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment or contact your administrator.

session.expiredMessage: You were logged out due to inactivity. Please sign in again.
session.timeoutWarning: Your session will expire in {{minutes}} minutes.
session.serverUnreachableMessage: We're having trouble verifying your session. Please check your connection and try again.

sessionTimeout.title: Session Timeout
sessionTimeout.message: Your session is about to expire due to inactivity.

admin.title: Authentication Settings
admin.subtitle: Configure authentication and identity provider settings

ldap.userFilterHelp: Use any valid LDAP filter template containing {0}, for example (uid={0}) or (&(objectClass=user)(sAMAccountName={0})).
ldap.testDescription: Enter credentials to test authentication and group retrieval against the saved configuration.
ldap.noMappingsConfigured: No mappings configured. Users will be assigned 'User' role by default if not specified.

test.failureMessage: Authentication failed. Invalid credentials or connection error.
test.unsavedChanges: Save the LDAP configuration before testing recent changes.
test.logOutput: Log output will appear here after testing.

tls.title: TLS / Certificates
tls.caCertificateHelp: Paste a PEM-encoded CA certificate or chain used to verify the LDAP server when using ldaps://. Required only if the server uses a certificate not signed by a publicly trusted CA.
tls.caClearedHint: Leave blank to use the system trust store (or LDAP_TLS_CA_FILE env var if set).

provisioning.heading: User Provisioning Mode
provisioning.helpOnLogin: Users are created the first time they sign in. Periodic sync only refreshes display names and role mappings of existing users.
provisioning.helpAutoAll: Periodic sync creates a local account for every LDAP entry that matches the user filter, and keeps existing users in sync.

errors.userFilterPlaceholderRequired: User filter must include {0}, for example (uid={0}) or (&(objectClass=user)(sAMAccountName={0})).
errors.bindCredentialsRequired: Both Bind DN and Bind Password are required together
errors.tlsCaInvalidPem: Certificate must be PEM-encoded with BEGIN/END CERTIFICATE markers
errors.tlsCaFileReadFailed: Could not read the selected file

loginErrors.invalid_state: Your sign-in attempt expired before it could be completed. Please try again.
loginErrors.invalid_response: The identity provider returned an unexpected response. Please try again or contact your administrator.
loginErrors.provider_disabled: This identity provider is not currently available. Please contact your administrator.
loginErrors.provider_misconfigured: This identity provider is not fully configured. Please contact your administrator.
loginErrors.account_disabled: Your account has been disabled. Please contact your administrator.
loginErrors.identity_conflict: This identity cannot be linked to a Praetor account. Please contact your administrator.
loginErrors.generic: Sign-in failed. Please try again or contact your administrator.

sso.name: Name
sso.noMappingsConfigured: No mappings configured. Users will be assigned the User role by default.

errors.slugInvalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
errors.samlConfigRequired: Metadata or manual IdP fields are required
errors.idpIssuerRequired: IdP Issuer is required unless inline metadata XML provides it
errors.acsUrlUnavailable: ACS URL unavailable: configure SSO_CALLBACK_BASE_URL on the backend.
